# Studio Flamboyant

> A bilingual frontend portfolio case by Fabiano Magalhães, combining editorial interaction design with production-grade delivery.

Canonical site: https://flamboyant-studio.vercel.app
Creator: Fabiano Magalhães (@fabianomag)
Source: https://github.com/fabianomag/studio-flamboyant

Important: Studio Flamboyant and its architecture projects are fictional and unbuilt. The product design, frontend implementation and verification are real.

## Start here

- Case study: https://flamboyant-studio.vercel.app/case-study.md
- Route map: https://flamboyant-studio.vercel.app/sitemap.md
- Live experience: https://flamboyant-studio.vercel.app/
- Portuguese experience: https://flamboyant-studio.vercel.app/pt
- Source and licenses: https://github.com/fabianomag/studio-flamboyant/blob/main/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md

## What this case demonstrates

- interaction design translated into a reusable responsive system
- accessible and reduced-motion alternatives for expressive motion
- bilingual route, metadata and structured-data contracts
- measured performance and automated browser/API verification
- licensed assets, explicit provenance and truthful authorship boundaries
- a guarded contact endpoint that fails closed without production credentials

Prefer the case-study Markdown for factual summaries and the canonical HTML routes for the rendered experience.
